_meta.purpose: Design system definition. Lock visual language before building. No UI code lives here.
_meta.tone: A senior creative's brain made visible. Thinking-in-progress. Copy is as important as visuals. Not corporate, not polished portfolio.

roles.background: ink-black — used everywhere, no exceptions. No white, no off-white, no light surfaces.
roles.surface-card: dark-teal (#005f73) — primary card/tile background. Creates depth against ink-black.
roles.surface-card-alt: dark-cyan (#0a9396) — secondary card variant. Use to differentiate adjacent tiles.
roles.surface-raised: dark-teal at 60% opacity — for modals, overlays, or elevated panels.
roles.text-primary: wheat (#e9d8a6) — all body copy, headings, labels. Never pure white.
roles.text-secondary: wheat at 55% opacity — captions, metadata, timestamps, helper text.
roles.text-muted: wheat at 30% opacity — placeholder text, disabled states, decorative numbers.
roles.accent-primary: golden (#ee9b00) — CTAs, active states, key emphasis words in headlines, hover underlines, stat numbers.
roles.accent-secondary: aqua (#94d2bd) — secondary links, tag chips, toggle-on state, subtle highlights.
roles.accent-danger: caramel (#ca6702) — use sparingly: error states, 'unhinged' filter tag active state.
roles.accent-deep: rusty (#bb3e03) — use very sparingly: destructive actions only, never decorative.

usage_rules.hover_links: Underline animates in golden (#ee9b00). Text color stays wheat — do NOT change text color on hover.
usage_rules.hover_cards: Card border or left-edge accent reveals in golden. Background shifts from dark-teal to dark-cyan. No scale transforms that break layout.
usage_rules.active_nav: Golden underline, 2px, below nav item. Text stays wheat.
usage_rules.cta_buttons: Background: golden. Text: ink-black. Hover: background shifts to aqua, text stays ink-black. Border-radius: 100px (pill).
usage_rules.ghost_buttons: Border: wheat at 40%. Text: wheat. Hover: border becomes golden, text becomes golden.
usage_rules.filter_tags: Default: border wheat 30%, text wheat 55%. Active-all: golden border + golden text. Active-smart: aqua border + aqua text. Active-unhinged: caramel border + caramel text.
usage_rules.project_tile_numbers: wheat at 20% opacity — purely decorative, never interactive.
usage_rules.stat_callouts: golden for the number, aqua for the unit or label.
usage_rules.messy_thinking_block: Background: dark-teal. Border: dashed, aqua at 40%. Text: wheat at 70%. Font: Skribblugh.
usage_rules.cursor_thought_bubble: Background: dark-teal. Border: aqua at 50%. Text: aqua. Font: Skribblugh.
usage_rules.greeting_banner: Background: golden. Text: ink-black. Font: Skribblugh.
usage_rules.contact_strip: Background: dark-teal. Heading: wheat. CTA: ghost button style.
usage_rules.easter_egg_tooltip: Background: golden. Text: ink-black. Font: Skribblugh.
usage_rules.scroll_reveal_line: golden, 1px, animates width from 0 to 100% on reveal.

contrast_rules.wheat_on_ink-black: WCAG AA pass — primary text pairing, always safe.
contrast_rules.golden_on_ink-black: WCAG AA pass — accent on background, safe for large text and UI elements.
contrast_rules.aqua_on_ink-black: WCAG AA pass — secondary accent on background, safe.
contrast_rules.ink-black_on_golden: WCAG AA pass — use for button text on golden backgrounds.
contrast_rules.wheat_on_dark-teal: WCAG AA pass — card body text, safe.
contrast_rules.golden_on_dark-teal: WCAG AA pass — accent on card, safe.
contrast_rules.caramel_on_ink-black: WCAG AA borderline — use only for large text (18px+) or non-critical UI.
contrast_rules.rusty_on_ink-black: WCAG AA fail — never use for text. Decorative/icon use only at large sizes.

do_not_use: No white (#ffffff) or near-white surfaces anywhere.
No light grey backgrounds — the entire site lives in the dark palette.
rusty (#bb3e03) is never used for body text or interactive labels.
caramel (#ca6702) is never used for small text (below 18px).
Do not mix golden and aqua as adjacent text colors — they compete. Use one per section.
Do not use dark-teal or dark-cyan as text color — they are surface colors only.
No color gradients between palette colors — flat surfaces only.
No opacity tricks on golden that make it look brown — if it reads muddy, use aqua instead.

kenoky.load_note: Self-hosted or via Fontshare if available. Fallback: Georgia, serif.
kenoky.character: Architectural, editorial. Carries authority without shouting.

satoshi.role: Body copy / UI labels / Navigation links / Captions
satoshi.character: Clean, modern, readable at small sizes. The workhorse.

skribblugh.role: Cursor thought bubbles / Messy thinking blocks / Handwritten annotations / Easter eggs / Greeting banner
skribblugh.character: Feels like a real person's handwriting. Signals 'this is the unfiltered brain'. Use sparingly — every instance should feel intentional.

display-xl.use: Hero headline on landing page only.

display-lg.use: Project page headlines, About page headline.

heading-lg.use: Tile names on project grid, sidebar stat labels.

body-lg.use: Project writeup paragraphs. The main reading experience.

body-md.use: About page body, meta descriptions, secondary copy.

label.use: Category tags, metadata labels, 'What I did' headers, filter buttons.

handwritten-lg.use: Messy thinking blocks, sidebar insight quotes.

handwritten-sm.use: Cursor thought bubbles, easter egg tooltips, greeting banner.

stat.use: Result numbers in project sidebars (+20%, 700+, etc.).

hierarchy_rules.one_display_per_page: Each page gets exactly one display-xl or display-lg headline. Never two.
hierarchy_rules.em_for_emphasis: Italic <em> inside Kenoky headlines uses golden color. One em per headline maximum.
hierarchy_rules.no_bold_body: Satoshi body copy is never bolded for emphasis — use a new sentence or restructure instead.
hierarchy_rules.skribblugh_is_rare: Skribblugh appears in at most 3 places per page. If it's everywhere, it means nothing.
hierarchy_rules.labels_are_not_headings: Label-scale text (11px uppercase) never replaces a heading. It introduces one.
hierarchy_rules.line_length: Body copy max-width: 65ch. Never let a paragraph span full viewport width.
hierarchy_rules.italic_headlines: Kenoky italic is a design choice, not a grammar choice. Use it for the word that carries the emotional weight of the headline.
hierarchy_rules.copy_weight: Copy is as important as layout. A weak headline is a broken component. Rewrite before restyling.

scale.2xl: 64px  (8×)  — between major sections within a page

layout.page_top_offset: 3xl (96px) — clears fixed nav with breathing room

motion.philosophy: Motion reveals, it doesn't perform. Every animation should feel like the page is thinking, not showing off.

easing.default: cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1) — fast out, slow settle. The 'thinking' ease.
easing.exit: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 1, 1)    — elements leaving quickly, not lingering.

do_not: No bounce or spring physics — this is a writer's portfolio, not a product demo.
No parallax scrolling — it fights the reading experience.
No loading spinners — if something takes time, show a skeleton state in dark-teal.

dot.note: No multiply blend — it distorts on dark backgrounds.

hover_states.on_link: dot grows to 16px, color shifts to aqua
hover_states.on_project_tile: dot grows to 20px, color stays golden
hover_states.on_cta_button: dot shrinks to 6px, trail expands to 48px

navigation.border_bottom: 1px solid wheat at 8% — barely visible, just enough to separate
navigation.logo: Kenoky, 20px, wheat. Hover: golden, no underline.
navigation.links: Satoshi, 13px, uppercase, wheat at 80%. Hover: wheat 100% + golden underline animates in.
navigation.cta_link: Treated as ghost button — border wheat 40%, hover border golden.

project_tile.name: Kenoky, heading-lg scale, wheat
project_tile.micro_copy: Satoshi, 13px italic, wheat at 60%. Hidden by default, reveals on hover.
project_tile.arrow: golden circle, ink-black arrow icon. Hidden by default, scale(0.7) → scale(1) on hover.

filter_buttons.default: border: 1.5px solid wheat at 30%, text: wheat at 60%, background: transparent
filter_buttons.hover: border: wheat at 60%, text: wheat at 90%

contact_strip.cta: ghost button style — border wheat 40%, text wheat, hover: border golden, text golden

voice_and_copy_rules.headline_formula: Verb or tension first. Em on the emotional word. Max 6 words per line, 3 lines max.
voice_and_copy_rules.micro_copy: One sentence. Specific. Slightly self-aware. Never generic ('great work', 'amazing results').
voice_and_copy_rules.messy_thinking: Stream of consciousness. Arrows (→) between thoughts. Parenthetical asides. Ends with a realization, not a summary.
voice_and_copy_rules.labels_and_tags: Factual. No adjectives. 'Campaign · BookMyShow · 2022' not 'Award-winning Campaign'.
voice_and_copy_rules.cta_copy: Active, directional. 'Let's make something →' not 'Contact me'. Arrow is part of the copy.
voice_and_copy_rules.stat_copy: Number first, context second. '+20%' then 'Weekday bookings increase' — never the reverse.
voice_and_copy_rules.skribblugh_copy: Sounds like a real thought, not a designed thought. If it sounds like a tagline, rewrite it.

do_not_build_yet: This file defines the design system only. No pages, no components, no CSS. Lock this first.
